title: Odisha’s Coolest Comfort Food!
description:
Pakhala Bhat is more than just food in Odisha — it’s a tradition, an emotion, and a summer essential. 🇮🇳
Made with fermented rice soaked overnight in water, this cooling dish is served with curd, onion, green chillies, and flavorful tempering. Often paired with aloo bharta, fried fish, sabzi, or badi chura, it becomes a complete comfort meal.

Odisha even celebrates a special day called Pakhala Dibasa to honor this iconic dish.

Have you ever tried Pakhala Bhat?
